2a_-PWI6vd.title: Robux Referral
2a_-PWI6vd.quest_text:
Invite your friends to Medal and you can both earn 100 Robux! Your Roblox account must be connected to Medal, and you must be in the official Medal TV Roblox group. For your referrals to count towards this quest, your friend must complete their New User Quest by signing up for Medal, using your Medal username as their referral on signup (on in their settings), verifying their phone number, joining the Medal TV Roblox group, clip Roblox at least once on their Medal Desktop app, and claiming their Robux.
You need at least 1 eligible invite to claim. Rewards are anywhere between 14-21 days. Leaving the Roblox group or disconnecting your Roblox account from Medal will prevent you from receiving Robux rewards.
2a_-PWI6vd.reward_desc: Earn Robux by inviting friends to Medal

2pQLGqBjtd.title: DonutSMP x Medal
2pQLGqBjtd.quest_text:
Earn exclusive DonutSMP shards by clipping your Minecraft gameplay with Medal. This quest is available to new Medal users only and must be completed on PC — it will not appear on mobile.
DonutSMP is a Java Edition-only quest. Bedrock accounts (usernames starting with '.') are not eligible to claim rewards. If you're on Java and still having trouble, it may be a username issue and I can open a ticket.
1. Download and install Medal on PC
Medal is the easiest way to record and edit Minecraft clips. Install the desktop app to get started.
2. Start the quest
Open Medal, go to Home, and find the Quests sidebar on the right. Select the DonutSMP x Medal quest and click "Start Quest."
3. Clip your gameplay on DonutSMP
Launch Minecraft and log in to donutsmp.net. Press F8 while playing to save the last 15 seconds of gameplay, then post the clip to your profile with #donutsmp in the description.
4. Submit on Medal
Return to the Medal homepage, open the DonutSMP quest from the sidebar, enter the Minecraft username you want the reward tied to, and click Submit.
5. Redeem in-game
Head back to DonutSMP and type /medal in chat to claim your shards.

2TwXgCxTNe.title: Free Minecraft Server
2TwXgCxTNe.reward_desc: Get a Free 3GB Premium Minecraft Server from Modrinth

3EwM4xC8im.title: Lunar x Medal
3EwM4xC8im.quest_text: New users only. Must have registered on Medal on or after October 20, 2025. PC Only.

5igWEFeZZe.title: Gun Evolution x Medal
5igWEFeZZe.quest_text: The gun evolution quest will start on May 10 at 11:00AM PST. To complete the quest, connect your Roblox account to Medal and download Medal on your PC. While playing Gun Evolution and with Medal running, press F8 to clip your best roll in Gun Evolution. If you are on a mobile device like iOS or Android, you must screen record your gameplay and upload it to your Medal profile on the Medal mobile app.

56ULW67muy.title: Violence District x Medal
56ULW67muy.quest_text: clip and upload your best moments in Violence District on Roblox to complete the clip requirement. Mobile users can upload screen recordings of their gameplay to the Medal mobile app to complete the quest. The quest starts at 6am PST.
56ULW67muy.reward_name: Exclusive Slasher Skin and Parry Dagger Skin

5nMnZpcL7y.title: Superstar Baseball x Medal
5nMnZpcL7y.quest_text: Clip using F8 and post your best Superstar Baseball moments from Roblox onto Medal. Mobile users can upload their screen recordings to the Medal mobile app.

The Medal quests that count for this quest are in the following games on Roblox: Violence District, Weird Gun Game, Airsoft Battles, Ground War, Survive Zombie Arena, Energy Assault, Warfare Tycoon, Zombie War Tycoon, Crab Royale, Last Letter, MM2 Aim Trainer, Burrowed Fears, Case Paradise, War Tycoon FN-2000, Bite By Night, Violence District, Beat Bounce, Operation One, Superstar Baseball, +1 Speed Keyboard Escape, Pixel Quest, Hell Rails, Combat Initiation, Shadow Battlegrounds, Noob Tower Defense, Dive Down, Classic Gun Game
